archetype.name: Duelist
archetype.note: This archetype offers Improved Dueling Riposte at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Improved Dueling Riposte
feat.text: Your weapon whirls and darts, striking foes whenever the slightest opening or moment of weakness presents itself. You can use Dueling Riposte even if you aren’t benefiting from Dueling Parry. At the start of each of your turns, you gain an additional reaction that you can use only to make a Dueling Riposte.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
